steps.title: Evaluate the function f at x=0
steps.content:
$$f(0)=60(0)+18=18$$
At the moment the train crosses the city border, x = 0 hours. The function value f(0) gives the distance from the station at that time, which is 18 kilometers.

steps.title: Interpret the constant term
steps.content:
The constant term 18 is the distance from the station when x = 0, i.e., before any time has passed after crossing the border. Therefore, the train had already traveled 18 kilometers from the station to reach the city border.
That matches the correct answer -- A is correct.
